archive.note: GitHub-generated source snapshot of the ∈ Principle repository at tag v1.0, archived by Zenodo as the software deposit.

provenance.method: Downloaded the immutable Zenodo copy of the release source archive (record 18965669, files[0]); verified its Zenodo MD5 byte-for-byte and recomputed the authoritative sha-256. The archive was not modified, recompressed, or regenerated.

tools.note: download of the Zenodo file content endpoint
BSD md5 (origin fixity cross-check against Zenodo)

notes: Technical evidence for the served Artifact of amw-005 (∈ Principle): the real release SOURCE ARCHIVE of the ∈ Principle software (kind=code), NOT a PDF and NOT either book edition. The Zenodo MD5 (2f6242efc16d6782033179b8b2e9b24c) matches the served copy byte-for-byte; the sha-256 above is authoritative for the served file. This is a software deposit, so there are no PDF fields (page_count/pdf_version/text-layer) — text_extractable is null (not applicable). Bibliographic Work data lives in work.json (the SSOT). Shared fields (artifact_id/work_id/version_id, mime, bytes, sha-256 checksum, text_extractable=null, future_public_path) MUST match work.json exactly; divergence is a blocking error. Publication gate: current_visibility=public, publication_status=published. Two byte-identical copies exist — the internal source under current_internal_path and the served public copy at future_public_path (/works/e-principle/e-principle-v1.0.zip).
